title: rosa jundzilliana f. tolosana
intro: Rosa jundzilliana f. tolosana, also known as Tolosa rose or Rosa tolosana, is a rare and unique species of rose, native to the Pyrenees mountains. This fragrant, pink-flowered rose has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The rose's hips, which are the fruit of the rose plant, are rich in vitamins and minerals, offering various health benefits such as supporting immune function and providing antioxidant protection. The rose hips can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being dried and used as a supplement or added to food products.
